---
title: "Venue"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
## Venue
:::

<br>

The event will take place in [Mathematisches Institut der LMU München (Theresienstraße 39, Munich)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/FbBq5AVWhJQc9SjM9) [Room B349](https://www.lmu.de/raumfinder/#/building/bw1003/map?room=100203349_).



![](assets/mathebau.png){fig-align="center"}


![](assets/mathebau_googlemap.png){fig-align="center"}
